Hey Alex,

I just set you up as my screening assistant on SafeSitter. David and I need to find a regular babysitter for Ethan and Lily, and I'd love your help reviewing candidates.

SafeSitter is the platform we're using to find sitters here in Portland. They run background checks and collect references, but I need someone to actually go through all the profiles and tell me who's worth interviewing. That's where you come in.

I'll be sending over candidates soon — excited to have your help with this!

Rachel
